summary: Iteration 290: Server-Side Upload Proxy + Story Chain Model. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - My Stories page shows 3 story chains, Story Chain View page displays timeline with Original/COMPLETED badges, Photo to Comic upload zone works correctly with all data-testid attributes present.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/storage/upload correctly implements server-side proxy upload (no CORS issues)
Server-side upload rejects non-image files with 400 error
Server-side upload rejects files over 15MB with 400 error
GET /api/photo-to-comic/my-chains returns user's story chains with backfill
GET /api/photo-to-comic/chain/{chain_id} returns full chain tree with flat list
Story chain data model: jobs have story_chain_id, root_job_id, parent_job_id, branch_type, sequence_number
My Stories page (data-testid='my-stories-page') displays chains grid with 3 chains
Story Chain View page shows timeline with Original/Continuation/Remix badges
Photo to Comic post-gen panel includes View Story Chain button (data-testid='view-story-chain-btn')
Upload zone triggers server-side proxy upload flow with progress indicator
CDN ready badge shown after upload completes
seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test users. Test user has 3 existing story chains after backfill.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features in this iteration: 1) POST /api/storage/upload for server-side proxy upload (eliminates CORS dependency), 2) Story chain model with chain_id, root_job_id, parent_job_id, branch_type, sequence_number fields, 3) GET /api/photo-to-comic/my-chains returns chains with episode counts/continuations/remixes, 4) GET /api/photo-to-comic/chain/{chain_id} returns full chain tree, 5) Frontend pages: /app/my-stories (MyStories.jsx) and /app/story-chain/:chainId (StoryChainView.jsx), 6) View Story Chain button in post-gen panel.

details: Returns success=true, storage_key, public_url for valid images
Returns chains array with total count
Each chain has chain_id, total_episodes, continuations, remixes
Jobs include chain fields after backfill

backend: TestServerSideUploadProxy - 4 tests (valid upload, reject non-image, reject >15MB, require auth)
TestStoryChainEndpoints - 5 tests (my-chains list, episode counts, chain 404, require auth)
frontend: Photo to Comic upload zone verified
My Stories page loads with chains grid
Story Chain View page loads with timeline
Navigation from My Stories to Story Chain View works
